name: 1auction
description: Mini Realtime Auction Room — Next.js + Socket.io + Redis + PostgreSQL

scripts.dev: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter '*' dev
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter '@auction/web' build && bun run --filter '@auction/socket-server' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.dev:web: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @auction/web dev
scripts.dev:socket: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @auction/socket-server dev
scripts.build:web: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @auction/web build
scripts.build:socket: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @auction/socket-server build
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/.next packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist
